title: Should We Fear The Correction
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
William of Ockham was a 14th-century English Franciscan friar. As an unusually clever person, he wasn't very much liked by either the church (for insisting on inserting logic into theological discussions) or by the Pope himself (presumably for being English on top of being a smarty-pants). He is best known for Okham's "razor", a philosophical theorem.
